description_long: This is a circular stone water well set atop a floating, grassy patch of earth. The well is constructed from stacked gray stones, with a wooden frame supporting a horizontal beam and a rolled-up rope. A wooden bucket is suspended from the rope, positioned above the well opening. The surrounding terrain is lush with green grass, small rocks, and tufts of wild plants, giving a natural, park-like appearance. The well lacks a cover but features a simple wooden pulley mechanism for drawing water. The overall scene is rustic and evokes a tranquil, rural or park setting.
description: A stone water well with a wooden bucket and pulley, set on a grassy, rocky patch of earth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the well's stone structure, wooden frame, and bucket hanging over the opening, with dense grass and rocks in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bucket and rope mechanism, with a large rock and scattered stones visible on the grassy surface.
description_view_2: Rear view of the well, showing the back of the stone structure and wooden frame, with more grass and a prominent rock nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the bucket and rope, with tufts of grass and a large rock to the left.
attribute_presence_of_pulley_or_bucket_m: A wooden bucket is suspended from a rope wound around a horizontal wooden beam, serving as a simple pulley mechanism.
attribute_surrounding_protective_structu: The well is surrounded by a low stone wall, approximately waist-high, forming the main protective barrier.
